markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Demo AI visibility tools and discuss Brex's needs.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New AI Visibility Model:** A shared library of 100k+ prompts across 1.5k B2B categories provides a free, standardized index for tracking, replacing the need for each brand to build research from scratch.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [**Brex's Core Needs:** Platform-specific tracking (ChatGPT, Gemini, AI Overviews), citation pattern analysis, and a tool to detect hallucinated URLs in AI citations.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [**Integrated "OS" Platform:** A private "OS" platform is being built to close the loop between AI visibility, content execution, and performance analytics, with Brex as a potential lighthouse customer.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [**Pilot Program:** Brex will receive free, unlimited access to the public "Check That" tool to provide feedback, with the goal of becoming a lighthouse customer for the full "OS" platform.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)

## Topics

### Brex's AI Visibility Needs

  - [**Platform-Specific Tracking:** Must optimize for ChatGPT, Gemini, and AI Overviews, which have different growth rates and citation patterns.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [**Citation Pattern Analysis:** Identify specific content elements (e.g., keywords, sentence structure) that influence citations.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=3128.0)
      - [**Example:** A change on Brex's site from "10x-20x" to "20x-30x" credit limits was quickly reflected in AI citations, proving the direct impact of specific phrases.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=3128.0)
  - [**Hallucinated URL Detection:** A critical feature to identify and fix non-existent URLs in AI citations, which can cause 404s and lost conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=2242.0)
  - [**Competitive Benchmarking:** A matrix view showing citation share vs. competitors is a key C-suite requirement.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=3491.0)

### New AI Visibility Model

  - [**Problem:** Current tools require each brand to build research from scratch, are expensive, and lack APIs.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [**Solution:** A shared, standardized index of B2B buying evaluation prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
      - [**Prompt Library:** 100k+ prompts across 1.5k B2B categories.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Brand Context:** Deep research on 6k+ brands to enable highly relevant, auto-generated prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Free Tier:** Access to the shared library for visibility, serving as a massive SEO play.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Paid Tier:** Custom prompt tracking funds the library's expansion.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [**Predictive Modeling:** Data scientists are building models to identify content features that predict citation success.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)

### Integrated "OS" Platform

  - [**Vision:** A private, AI-native system of work that connects visibility, execution, and analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=2059.0)
  - [**Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
      - [**Discovery:** Programmatically finds content opportunities (e.g., citation gaps).](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
      - [**Execution:** Custom pipelines (e.g., how-to, comparison) use the brand kit to generate unique content.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
      - [**Analytics:** Correlates content activities with outcomes (traffic, conversions).](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=1984.0)
  - [**Core Technology:** Built on `output.ai`, a proprietary, open-source workflow-as-code framework.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=2130.0)

### Content Strategy & Product Ideas

  - [**Focus:** Create content that solves user problems, not just product features.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=2935.0)
      - [**Example:** "How to negotiate better pricing with HubSpot" vs. "How much does Brex spend on Airtable?"](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=2935.0)
  - [**Productize Workflows:** Build simple, valuable web apps that abstract product features.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=2750.0)
      - [**Examples:** A receipt classifier, a sales projection model, or an RFP generator.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=2770.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Captures user domain info for lead generation.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=3019.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marcel:** Grant Brex free, unlimited access to the "Check That" tool next week.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=3432.0)
  - [**Marcel:** Share Brex's feedback with the engineering team for prioritization.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=3454.0)
  - [**Marcel:** Provide early access to the "OS" platform once it's ready.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=3464.0)
  - [**Jon:** Explore the "Check That" tool and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/im2qm1b3KYx8g9yc2Sfxt1MxTwbBGRj8?tab=summary&timestamp=3432.0)
